context7.description: Up-to-date docs for Next.js, shadcn, LangGraph, Drizzle, etc. Use when answering API questions.

shadcn.description: Add or update shadcn/ui components from inside Claude Code without leaving the session.

note:
Add these optional MCPs via Claude Code when you want them:
- supabase: https://mcp.supabase.com/mcp (DB, auth, storage)
- vercel:   https://mcp.vercel.com/ (deploys + logs)
- exa:      https://mcp.exa.ai/mcp (web search in-agent)
Run the Cowork connector UI or `claude mcp add <uuid>` from the CLI.
